Worker.instruction: Simulated LLM inference worker. AddPrompt admits a UserMessage (id + content mandatory; chat/message optional) into the continuous-batching loop — prompts are tokenized a-z → 0-25, generated tokens stream to the linked redis (stream key tokens:<id>, END token 26 last), and finished sequences keep their KV caches in a TTL prefix cache keyed by chat. GetStatus reports whether the worker has space.
